reforms.description: The German government is supporting the availability of start-up finance through public credit guarantees and preferential loan conditions for entrepreneurs and investors, while also improving conditions for venture capital access through the Act on 'risk capital companies', aimed at enhancing investment in the venture capital market.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: These measures are designed to enhance access to finance for startups, which is crucial for their growth and innovation potential.
reforms.status_evidence: The measures have been put into practice to support startups.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reforms significantly improve the financial landscape for startups but do not represent a structural overhaul.
reforms.source_quote: The availability of start-up finance is being supported by public credit guarantees and preferential loan conditions which are offered to potential entrepreneurs and investors as part of the general program of support for small and medium-sized companies.

reforms.description: The government has initiated reforms to promote more market-based forms of risk finance through capital market development, improving conditions for stock market access for small and medium-sized firms.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: These reforms aim to enhance the financial capabilities of small and medium-sized firms, facilitating their growth and innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The government has announced these reforms to improve market-based risk finance.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reforms are significant in improving access to finance but do not constitute a major overhaul of the financial system.
reforms.source_quote: Recent policy reforms have improved the conditions for stock market access, especially of small and medium sized firms, while also improving market transparency.

reforms.description: The government is promoting more flexible skills through general education and training, aiming to better match vocational skills with employment opportunities in changing technology.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing the skills of the workforce, this initiative supports innovation and productivity in the economy.
reforms.status_evidence: The government has announced this initiative to improve vocational training.
reforms.importance_rationale: The initiative is significant in addressing skills mismatches but does not represent a fundamental change in the education system.
reforms.source_quote: Promotion of more flexible skills through general education and training... will also be needed to create a better match between skills and final employment opportunities, geared to changing technology.
